reviews.comment:
Todo lo que uno espera de una YPF en una ruta en Argentina. Muy limpio el baño (se agradece cuando uno viene viajando) y muy completo el C-Store (YPF Full).

(Translated by Google)
Everything you'd expect from a YPF station on a highway in Argentina. The bathroom was very clean (a welcome feature when traveling) and the convenience store (YPF Full) was very well-stocked.
